text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 25 

CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Claim Facility Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The type of facility. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 

VALUES: 1 = Hospital 
2 = Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF) 
3 = home health Agency (HHA) 
4 = Religious Non-medical
